cosponsor.script: Hi, my name is {{name}} and I'm a constituent in {{state}}'s {{district}} congressional district. I'm calling to thank {{repTitle}} {{repName}} for co-sponsoring the articles of impeachment. I urge them to continue pushing for swift proceedings. This is an important step for accountability and the rule of law. Thank you for your time.
talkingPoints: Thank them for their leadership on accountability
Urge them to push for swift proceedings
Ask what constituents can do to support the effort

publicly-supports.script: Hi, my name is {{name}} and I'm a constituent in {{state}}'s {{district}} congressional district. I'm calling to thank {{repTitle}} {{repName}} for supporting impeachment proceedings. I urge them to take the next step and co-sponsor the articles of impeachment. Accountability matters. Thank you for your time.
talkingPoints: Thank them for speaking up
Urge them to formally co-sponsor the articles
Express that accountability is important to you as a voter

leaning-support.script: Hi, my name is {{name}} and I'm a constituent in {{state}}'s {{district}} congressional district. I'm calling because I believe impeachment is necessary for accountability. I've seen that {{repTitle}} {{repName}} has expressed some openness to this, and I want to encourage them to publicly support impeachment proceedings. Thank you for your time.
talkingPoints: Acknowledge their openness to the process
Encourage them to take a clear public stance
Share why accountability matters to you personally

silent.script: Hi, my name is {{name}} and I'm a constituent in {{state}}'s {{district}} congressional district. I'm calling to urge {{repTitle}} {{repName}} to take a clear stance on impeachment. As their constituent, I believe accountability is essential and I'd like to know where they stand. I urge them to support impeachment proceedings. Thank you for your time.
talkingPoints: Ask where they stand on impeachment
Express that silence is not acceptable on this issue
Share why this matters to you as a voter in their district

leaning-oppose.script: Hi, my name is {{name}} and I'm a constituent in {{state}}'s {{district}} congressional district. I'm calling to urge {{repTitle}} {{repName}} to reconsider their position on impeachment. I believe this is a matter of constitutional accountability, not partisan politics. I urge them to put country over party and support impeachment proceedings. Thank you for your time.
talkingPoints: Frame this as a constitutional issue, not a partisan one
Share specific concerns that motivate your call
Remind them they represent all constituents, not just one party

publicly-opposes.script: Hi, my name is {{name}} and I'm a constituent in {{state}}'s {{district}} congressional district. I'm calling to express my strong disagreement with {{repTitle}} {{repName}}'s opposition to impeachment. I believe accountability and the rule of law are fundamental to our democracy. I urge them to reconsider and support impeachment proceedings. Thank you for your time.
talkingPoints: Be respectful but firm in your disagreement
Focus on constitutional duty and accountability
Remind them you are a voter in their district and this matters to you

cosponsor.script: Hi, my name is {{name}} and I'm a constituent in {{state}}. I'm calling to thank Senator {{repName}} for leading on impeachment. I urge them to vote to convict if the articles reach the Senate. Thank you for your time.
talkingPoints: Thank them for their leadership
Urge them to vote to convict in a Senate trial
Ask what more can be done to support accountability

publicly-supports.script: Hi, my name is {{name}} and I'm a constituent in {{state}}. I'm calling to thank Senator {{repName}} for supporting impeachment. I urge them to vote to convict when the articles reach the Senate. Thank you for your time.
talkingPoints: Thank them for their stance
Urge a vote to convict
Express that accountability matters to you

leaning-support.script: Hi, my name is {{name}} and I'm a constituent in {{state}}. I'm calling to encourage Senator {{repName}} to publicly support impeachment and commit to voting to convict. Accountability is essential. Thank you for your time.
talkingPoints: Encourage them to take a firm stance
Ask them to commit to voting to convict
Share why this matters to you

silent.script: Hi, my name is {{name}} and I'm a constituent in {{state}}. I'm calling to urge Senator {{repName}} to take a clear stance on impeachment. As their constituent, I'd like to know where they stand. I believe accountability is essential and urge them to support conviction. Thank you for your time.
talkingPoints: Ask where they stand
Express that silence is unacceptable
Share why this matters to you as a voter

leaning-oppose.script: Hi, my name is {{name}} and I'm a constituent in {{state}}. I'm calling to urge Senator {{repName}} to reconsider their position. Impeachment is about constitutional accountability, not politics. I urge them to support conviction. Thank you for your time.
talkingPoints: Frame as constitutional duty
Share specific concerns
Remind them they represent all constituents

publicly-opposes.script: Hi, my name is {{name}} and I'm a constituent in {{state}}. I'm calling to express my disagreement with Senator {{repName}}'s opposition to impeachment. The rule of law matters. I urge them to reconsider and vote to convict. Thank you for your time.
talkingPoints: Be respectful but firm
Focus on constitutional duty
Remind them you vote in their state

cosponsor.script: Hi, my name is {{name}} and I'm a resident of {{state}}. I'm calling to thank Governor {{repName}} for supporting impeachment. Their voice as a state leader matters. Thank you for your time.
talkingPoints: Thank them for using their platform
Encourage them to continue speaking out
Ask what state-level actions can support accountability

Encourage them to use their platform
